title: × stenillocactus glassii
intro: × Stenillocactus glassii is a rare, hybrid cactus species resulting from the cross between Stenocactus concolor and Mammillaria glassii. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain types of bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of × Stenillocactus glassii include its potential use in reducing inflammation and improving wound healing due to its antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a herbal remedy by drying and crushing its stems, which can then be infused in water or used as a topical application.
